articles.title: Europe Makes Big Changes To Game Ratings - Dark Horizons
articles.description: The European game ratings board (PEGI) has announced that, starting in June, it will introduce minimum age ratings for games with what’s dubbed ‘interactive risk’ features. Under the new rules games with ‘paid random items’ (aka. loot boxes) will have a defau…
